query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awayML, homeML, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, gameDate FROM games WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND (awayTeam = 'st_louis_blues' OR homeTeam = 'winnipeg_jets') ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awayML, homeML, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, gameDate FROM games WHERE sport = 'NHL' AND (awayTeam = 'st_louis_blues' OR homeTeam = 'winnipeg_jets') ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 5;
